user.title: Peplink Router
user.description: Enter the router's address and choose an authentication method.

data_description.instance_name: Display name for this router (e.g. Rockwood Peplink)
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable if your router uses a self-signed certificate

data.username: Admin username (optional — for SpeedFusion Connect & diagnostics)

reconfigure.title: Admin credentials (SpeedFusion Connect & diagnostics)
reconfigure.description: Add the router's local admin username/password to enable SpeedFusion Connect data and thermal/fan diagnostics. These use the web-admin session, which token auth alone can't reach. Leave blank to remove.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the router. Check the URL and network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
error.invalid_admin_auth: Admin login failed — check the username/password.

abort.already_configured: This router instance is already configured.
